executiveSummary: The gap between UX design and frontend implementation costs enterprise software teams millions in lost productivity and delayed time-to-market. By leveraging AI to autonomously translate Figma designs into production-ready React code, we can capture a significant share of the DevTools market.

marketAnalysis.marketProblem: Developers spend 30-40% of their time translating visual designs into boilerplate UI code, leading to burnout, visual regression bugs, and slower feature delivery.
keyMarketTrends: Widespread enterprise adoption of centralized Design Systems (e.g., Figma).
Increasing comfort with AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot).
Macroeconomic pressure on tech companies to do more with fewer engineering headcount.

buyerPersonas.name: The Efficiency Driver
painPoints: Engineering teams are too slow to ship features.
High cost of engineering salaries spent on low-value UI work.
buyingCriteria: Must prove positive ROI within 6 months.
Must pass rigorous InfoSec and SOC2 compliance.

userPersonas.name: The Relieved Builder
painPoints: Hates pixel-pushing and arguing with designers over padding.
Wants to focus on complex state management and business logic.

competitiveLandscape.name: Legacy Low-Code/No-Code Builders (e.g., Webflow, Retool)
strengths: Highly visual, easy for non-technical users.
weaknesses: Produces 'spaghetti code' that cannot be integrated into complex, existing enterprise codebases.
competitiveLandscape.ourCompetitiveAdvantage: We do not host the code. We generate clean, idiomatic React ASTs that merge directly into the customer's existing Git repositories.

competitiveLandscape.name: Manual Handoff
weaknesses: Extremely slow, prone to human error and visual regressions.
competitiveLandscape.ourCompetitiveAdvantage: Reduces a 3-day manual workflow to a 3-minute automated PR review.

productPositioning.valueProposition: The only design-to-code platform that generates human-readable React components directly into your Git workflow.
productPositioning.elevatorPitch: Stop paying senior engineers to write boilerplate CSS. Our platform connects directly to Figma, parses design intents, and uses AI to generate production-ready React components that seamlessly drop into your existing CI/CD pipelines.
keyDifferentiators: Integrates with existing enterprise Design Systems rather than replacing them.

marketRequirements.description: The platform must offer on-premise or VPC-peered deployment options, and must not train public models on customer code.
marketRequirements.marketDriver: Essential to clear procurement at Fortune 500 banks and healthcare companies.

marketRequirements.description: Initial launch must support React and Tailwind CSS.
marketRequirements.marketDriver: React holds >70% of our target market's frontend ecosystem share.

goToMarketStrategy.pricingModel: $49/user/month (Devs + Designers) with an Enterprise Tier featuring custom model fine-tuning.
primarySalesChannels: Product-Led Growth (Freemium tier for individual devs)
marketingChannels: Technical Content Marketing (Engineering blogs, Hacker News)
